{{Quote|You are foolish to waste your kindness on this dumb creature. No lower lifeform is worth going hungry for.|[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] to [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]|<ref name="The Story of the Faithful Wookiee">''[[The Story of the Faithful Wookiee]]''</ref>}}
'''Paar's ichthyodonts''' were large [[saurian]] creatures that lived on [[Panna Prime]].

==Biology==
[[Homeworld/Legends|Native]] to the [[Water/Legends|watery]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Panna/Legends|Panna]], Paar's ichthyodonts were large [[Sentience/Legends|non-sentient]] aquatic [[saurian]] creatures. The creatures had a tapered, finned body, a long neck, and a wedge-shaped head.<ref name="TCSWE" />

==History==
In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], the notorious [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] named [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] used an ichthyodont to navigate the Mud Moon to find [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and gain his trust so Skywalker would bring him to the new [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance's]] [[Ring Base|base]] on [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader's]] orders.<ref name="TCSWE" />

==Behind the scenes==
This creature was first named on the "Holiday Special Boba Fett Character Key" from Acme Archives.

Living in the same ecosystem as the ichthyodont and Panna dragon was a smaller and paler beast that shared a strong resemblance to the ichthyodont. Its anatomy didn't seem vastly different, it may have simply been a younger member of the same species, or a different gender than the creature ridden by Boba Fett.

"Ichthyodont" means "fish-tooth" in Ancient Greek.

==Appearances==
